text: Watching $TSLA FSD compute buildout. Dojo roadmap unclear, staying neutral for now, I think the optionality is underappreciated though.
$RKLB Neutron timeline slipping again but backlog keeps growing. I believe launch cadence is the metric to watch.
$NVDA GB300 ramp on track per my supply chain checks. Rubin pull-in is real. Still the safest way to play AI capex, long.
$MRVL custom silicon wins at two hyperscalers confirmed. CPO transition is where the optionality is. Accumulating.
$LITE OSFP transceiver pricing holding up better than feared. Buying this dip, thesis unchanged.
Optics complex update: $LITE $COHR both seeing 800G upside. 1.6T sampling ahead of schedule per checks.
New names on my radar from the photonics deep dive: $AAOI and $POET. Both leveraged to 800G/1.6T datacenter optics.
$SIVE makes InP CW DFB lasers — the percolator feeding POET Starlight and every laser supplier ($LITE / $COHR) at a fraction of their valuation. Valuations make 0 sense. I am long, high conviction.
$SIVE follow-up: York Space Systems defense exposure is the sleeper narrative nobody prices in.
$AAOI Microsoft datacenter order expansion confirmed by two independent sources. Adding.
$NVDA Blackwell Ultra allocations tightening. $MRVL and $AVGO custom ASIC pipelines both full through 2027.
$AXTI InP substrate lead times stretching to 30 weeks. Upstream bottleneck thesis playing out. Long.
$POET Starlight engine design win at a tier-1 module maker. This validates the $SIVE laser supply thesis too.
$TSLA energy storage margins carrying the quarter again. Auto business still needs a catalyst.

Finished my $SIVE research. Built a position at ~$140M market cap. NVDA, Marvell, AMD customers will all default to SIVE laser paths via GlobalFoundries silicon photonics integration. Most groundbreaking news for Sivers in history.
$RKLB Neutron static fire complete. Re-rating catalyst incoming, I expect the market underprices this.
$SIVE GlobalFoundries partnership expands: CW-WDM lasers integrated into their silicon photonics platform. HVM transition funded. This is the inflection.
$LITE raised guidance again. 1.6T cycle is real. $AAOI riding the same wave, both remain core longs.
$MRVL investor day takeaway: 2028 TAM guide implies CPO attach rates double consensus. Bullish.
Trimmed some $COHR into strength, valuation getting ahead of the datacom mix shift.
$SIVE volume ramp confirmed for H2. I don't care about short-term volatility, thesis intact until HVM revenue lands.
$AXTI Q2 preannounce beats. Substrate pricing power finally showing up in numbers.
$POET secured $75M raise, runway through HVM. Dilution done, overhang cleared. Constructive.
$NVDA GTC Taiwan: Rubin CPX volume shipping. Optics content per GPU up 40% gen-on-gen. Good for $LITE $AAOI $SIVE.
$TSLA robotaxi expansion to 3 new metros. Still neutral on the stock, watching utilization data.
$SIVE NASDAQ uplisting timeline confirmed — coming quarters. Another leg of the thesis de-risked.
$RKLB Neutron first launch window announced. $MRVL also reporting tonight, expecting a beat on AI custom silicon.
$SIVE — today's GlobalFoundries release further confirms the NASDAQ listing timeline (coming quarters). Long-term holders will be rewarded, volume ramp is the only thing that matters.
$AAOI checks: 800G shipments to second hyperscaler started in June. Adding on any weakness.

SemiAnalysis on $META "overcapacity" and market reaction: we believe Meta's datacenter and compute will accelerate, not slow down. Capex in 2027 will be shockingly high. Recent global crash, especially in the photonics sector, was sparked by misleading narratives.
$SIVE down with the photonics complex. Nothing changed fundamentally. I'm long SIVE to see my thesis play out — short-term factor, development intact.
$SIVE addendum: LeaderDrive laser order flow unaffected per my checks. The selloff is narrative, not numbers.
$AAOI $LITE both dragged down today. 1.6T demand signals unchanged, treating this as noise.
$MRVL earnings reaction overdone. Custom silicon guide was fine, CPO commentary actually improved.
$POET and $AXTI both giving back the June run. Upstream photonics thesis needs patience here.
$TSLA holding up while everything AI-adjacent bleeds — interesting rotation tell.
$SIVE final note today: 631 explicit stance posts since December and I haven't flipped once. Conviction unchanged.
$RKLB Neutron wet dress rehearsal this week. Background note: $NVDA supply chain unaffected by the photonics drawdown.
